evidence.decolonization: Ukrainian parеmiology is framed through named Ukrainian collectors, regional variation, and anti-imperial source history without Russocentric derivation claims.
evidence.engagement: V2 inline/workbook activities cover proverb-function analysis, source evaluation, variant comparison, comparative study, and seminar essay practice.
evidence.pedagogical: Build teaches proverb/saying boundaries, two-part structure, metaphor, pragmatics, source discipline, contradiction, and ethical limits of modern use.
evidence.review: Claude Opus review found three blockers in round 1; fixes were applied and regenerated. Round 2 confirmed blockers resolved and no new blockers.
evidence.source_policy: Verbatim proverb fragments kept short. Manual spot-check confirmed four Galician fragments in Hrushevsky's discussion of Franko's corpus; the Franko page separately confirms the fox-and-hens fragment. Popular unverified forms are treated as paraphrase-only.
